prompts.SessionStart: forge bellows pumping air into furnace with roaring flame ignition, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: forge fire banked for the night with dying ember crackle, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: heavy blacksmith hammer ringing final strike on cooling iron, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: tongs gripping hot iron and lifting it from forge coals, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: small finished pin clicking into socket with quick satisfying snap, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: pressure gauge entering caution zone with brass alert whistle, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: forge coals glowing with slow rhythmic bellows creak, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: distribution valve opening new flow path with brass click, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: small finished rivet sliding into collection tray with quiet clink, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: heavy lever pulled firmly to activate launching mechanism, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
